"[37] The user's iPhone detected a VEHICLE CRASH that is LIKELY TO HAVE RESULTED IN INJURY. It is UNKNOWN how many OCCUPANTS may have been in the vehicle. This concludes the automatically-assembled data. You may now attempt to contact the user. However, messages may be delayed, and the user may not be able to respond. [Shared]"
